## What's Changed

- Normalized every Tube TV HLS item to one fixed profile resolution and NTSC-friendly frame rate so episodes and commercials do not reconfigure the player mid-channel.
- Added closed GOPs, two-second keyframe spacing, disabled B-frames, and forced QSV IDR frames so every HLS segment starts independently.
- Repeats codec and MPEG-TS headers at segment boundaries to prevent missing-reference decoder failures on Raspberry Pi hardware decoders.
- Added HLS discontinuity sequence tracking so rolling live playlists preserve correct transition history.
- Added regression coverage for QSV segment boundaries, fixed output canvases, and rolling playlist discontinuities.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

No configuration migration is required. Pair this release with Tater Tube player v1.5.2.
